title: An internal error occurred when using clang 12 or 13

features.name: 2d_unpacked_array_indexed_assignment
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array with indexed assignment in a sequential block

features.name: async_reset_with_for_loop_init
features.description: Code should include an asynchronous reset block with a for-loop initialization of a 2D unpacked array
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk or negedge resetb) begin
    if (!resetb) begin
        for (i = 0; i <= 31; i = i + 1) regs[i] <= 32'h0;
    end
end

features.name: signal_indexed_register_assignment
features.description: Code should include a register array assignment where the array index is a signal variable
